2219260.name: SHOOT. KILL. REPEAT.
2219260.description:
IT SEEMS IT'S TIME TO START SHOOTING...
When a new virus outbreak occurs immediately after the New Year holidays and the world quickly turns into a bloody mess! The one who could - survived, the rest turned into angry zombies! Now you have to immerse yourself in a world where your weapon has the last word.
You have no choice but to do three simple things: shoot, kill, repeat!

SURVIVE AND EXPLORE THE ENDLESS WORLD!
The whole world and all your ways of survival are completely random and generated by random generation.
Explore the world, look for ammunition and other things necessary for survival. Find your salvation with the help of your walkie-talkie signal. The game has a dynamic change of day and night.

ABSOLUTE HARDCORE
Despite its genre - "top view shooter", you will be provided with a realistic character control system with the ability to shoot from behind corners. Reloading weapons is not like other games. Here you have to manually remove the magazine and send the cartridge into the chamber. Loading ammunition into stores is now your routine. And this is just a part of the realistic mechanics in the game.

IS CREATED WITH UNDERSTANDING!
The only developer of the game, Pavel Repin, is a professional shooter and shooting instructor. Therefore, the main goal of the game is to convey a realistic experience with weapons and tactical equipment.
2219260.supported_languages:
英语, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
